description: Set up a new Quality Assurance department in Odoo. Create the 'Quality Assurance' department and a 'QA Inspector' job position within it. Configure a 'QA Shift Schedule' that operates Monday through Thursday from 07:00 to 17:30 (10 hours/day), with Friday, Saturday, and Sunday off. Onboard three employees into the 'Quality Assurance' department with the 'QA Inspector' job position and 'QA Shift Schedule': Maria Chen (maria.chen@meridianmfg.com, +1 (555) 014-7200), James Okafor (james.okafor@meridianmfg.com, +1 (555) 014-7201), and Sarah Petrov (sarah.petrov@meridianmfg.com, +1 (555) 014-7202). Assign Maria Chen as the Manager of the Quality Assurance department and as the Coach for James Okafor. Login credentials: admin@example.com / admin.
